description: In the video, a white rabbit is seen walking on a wooden plank, while another rabbit is nearby on a wooden platform.
The rabbit on the plank is walking away from the camera, and the one on the platform is facing the camera.
Both rabbits are in a backyard with a wooden fence and a tree in the background.
The rabbit on the platform is wearing a blue hoodie and holding a blue object.
